description: Back on Zephyr One, Simmons tends to the unconscious May while Enoch monitors for threats. Elena expresses her mistrust of Enoch despite his past assistance, and Simmons reassures her about Enoch's loyalty. The two discuss Yo-Yo's recovery and Simmons offers her more advanced prosthetic arms tailored to her powers, but Yo-Yo is conflicted about hiding her Inhuman nature, leading to an emotional conversation about identity and coping with trauma.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Are you sure we can trust him with her?
I've heard he's a decent guy, but... he isn't a guy. And it's his kind that's after us.
I'm only alive because of him.
So, he's fixing her up, huh?

Repairing damaged tissue. All being well, she should be up and around in a week or two. As for you... The Shrike material has dissolved into your vascular system. Your body appears to be breaking it down.
Okay. Good, right? So I'm clear to go outside, then?
Just one more thing. They're more advanced than the one Fitz made for Coulson, precisely calibrated to your Inhuman ability.
Ours is a world of Inhumans and LMDs, but we are a long way from home. A woman with mechanical arms would draw too much attention. They'll feel much more real...
It's not that. It's... I don't want to pretend like this didn't happen. This is who I am. I'm not ashamed of it.
And you shouldn't be. But when was the last time you actually felt something? With your fingertips? Take your time. Let me know.
